name: The Lunch Counter — Long Arm
description: The long horizontal section of the L-shaped counter, fourteen fixed stools on chrome posts bolted to the black-and-white checkerboard tile floor, the laminate surface wiped to a cold shine under fluorescent light. This is where Ezell, Franklin, and Joseph are seated — the section most visible from the store's main aisle.
atmosphericDetails: The smell of hot coffee from the urns behind the backbar — present, roasted, inaccessible
The sound of the grill ticking as it cools in the kitchen area behind the pass-through window
The chrome edge of the stool casing pressing cold through clothing — a physical fact that anchors every second of sitting here
The mirrored backbar reflecting the entire store behind the students — a surveillance surface that works in both directions
The bare laminate in front of each occupied stool where a cover should be but is not
